# Weekend UX

Weekend UX is a premier design education and training platform, providing professional UI/UX design courses, resources, and insights.

## Core Resources

- [Home](https://weekend-ui.netlify.app/): The main gateway to Weekend UX.
- [Courses](https://weekend-ui.netlify.app/courses): Professional UI/UX design courses, schedules, curriculums, and enrollment details.
- [Blogs](https://weekend-ui.netlify.app/category/blogs): Latest articles, design trends, case studies, and tutorials from our journal.
- [About Us](https://weekend-ui.netlify.app/about-us): Learn about our philosophy, track record, proving methods, and creative minds.
- [Contact Us](https://weekend-ui.netlify.app/contact-us): Get in touch for inquiries, collaborations, or support.

## Legal and Information

- [Privacy Policy](https://weekend-ui.netlify.app/privacy-policy): Privacy policies and data practices.
- [Disclaimer](https://weekend-ui.netlify.app/disclaimer): Terms of use and legal disclaimers.
